ConstructorArguments: Spring damping ratio (non-dimensional). A value of 1 is critically damped; values below 1 are springy, values above 1 are over-damped.

Spring damping ratio (non-dimensional). A value of 1 is critically damped;

ConstructorArguments: Maximum torque the joint can apply in newton-meters. Set to 0 for unlimited torque.
